sql: WITH base AS (SELECT l.loan_id, l.status, dist."A3" AS region, dist."A11" AS avg_salary, c.client_id, c.gender FROM loan AS l INNER JOIN account AS a ON a.account_id = l.account_id INNER JOIN district AS dist ON dist.district_id = a.district_id LEFT JOIN disp AS dp ON dp.account_id = a.account_id AND dp.type = 'OWNER' LEFT JOIN client AS c ON c.client_id = dp.client_id WHERE l.status IN ('A', 'B') AND l.date <= DATE '1997-12-31'), regional AS (SELECT region, COUNT(DISTINCT loan_id) AS finished_loan_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN status = 'B' THEN loan_id END) AS defaulted_loan_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN status = 'B' THEN loan_id END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT loan_id), 0) AS default_rate, COUNT(DISTINCT client_id) AS borrower_client_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN gender = 'M' THEN client_id END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT client_id), 0) AS male_client_pct, AVG(avg_salary) AS avg_branch_salary FROM base GROUP BY region) SELECT region, finished_loan_count, defaulted_loan_count, default_rate, borrower_client_count, male_client_pct, avg_branch_salary, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY default_rate DESC) AS default_rate_rank FROM regional ORDER BY default_rate DESC;
